task: Clean the full Mac Mini dirty worktree

governance_bootstrap.summary: Production work must follow origin/main, avoid unsafe direct edits, and report exact verification and deploy state.
Completion requires real runtime verification, git state evidence, and explicit handling of production dirty state.

changes: Backed up the full Mac Mini dirty state to scratch/dirty_cleanup_20260706_094021.
Created a git stash containing tracked and untracked dirty work.
Reset Mac Mini worktree to origin/main and cleaned untracked files.
Verified backend, frontend, IBKR paper runtime, and turtle/IBKR LaunchAgent entry locks after cleanup.

verification.name: Mac Mini dirty backup
verification.target: macmini scratch backup and git stash
verification.command: git status/diff capture, untracked tarball, git stash push --include-untracked
verification.result: passed: backup created at scratch/dirty_cleanup_20260706_094021 and stash@{0} saved as macmini full dirty cleanup backup 20260706_094021

verification.name: Mac Mini worktree reset
verification.command: git fetch origin -q && git reset --hard origin/main && git clean -fd
verification.result: passed: HEAD=ce8511d, origin/main=ce8511d, git status --short count=0

verification.name: Mac Mini IBKR paper runtime
verification.result: passed: Gateway connected, account DUQ416334 detected, broker-state match passed, SPY bars smoke test passed, verdict ALL CLEAR

verification.name: Mac Mini trading entry lock
verification.command: launchctl print for com.harness.turtle-auto-trader and com.harness.ibkr-auto-trader
verification.result: passed: turtle and IBKR auto traders are not running; both have PAPER_TRADING_MAX_POSITIONS=0 and PAPER_PYRAMID_ENABLED=false; turtle also has PAPER_TRADING_AUTO_EXECUTE=false

residual_risk: Cleaned dirty work is recoverable from scratch/dirty_cleanup_20260706_094021 and stash@{0}; do not blindly pop the stash.
